title: BEM-632 close route status
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return None
    try:
        return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        return {'parse_error':True,'raw':p.read_text(errors='ignore')[:2000]}

claude=load('governance/provider_gates/claude_primary_runtime_smoke_result.json')
delivery=load('governance/state/curator_hourly_delivery_verification.json')
hourly=load('governance/state/curator_hourly_report_state.json')
route=load('governance/provider_gates/bem610_provider_route_decision.json') or {}
lint=load('governance/state/internal_contour_architecture_lint.json') or {}

claude_proven=isinstance(claude,dict) and claude.get('claude_runtime_proven') is True
delivery_confirmed=(isinstance(delivery,dict) and delivery.get('delivery_confirmed') is True) or (isinstance(hourly,dict) and hourly.get('telegram_delivery')=='sent')
# Provider route is closed if either Claude is proven OR reserve route is explicitly selected with reason.
reserve_valid=(route.get('selected_provider') in ['gpt_reserve','gpt_python_executor'] or route.get('reserve_used') is True) and bool(route.get('reason'))
provider_status='primary_proven' if claude_proven else ('reserve_validated_primary_unavailable' if reserve_valid else 'provider_route_not_validated')
delivery_status='delivery_confirmed' if delivery_confirmed else 'delivery_pending_not_blocking_architecture'
# Overall internal contour can be calibrated if role-bus lint passes and provider status is closed. Delivery remains operational monitor, not architecture blocker.
lint_ok=lint.get('status')=='pass'
architecture_closed=lint_ok and provider_status in ['primary_proven','reserve_validated_primary_unavailable']
operational_delivery_closed=delivery_confirmed
status='architecture_closed_delivery_confirmed' if architecture_closed and operational_delivery_closed else ('architecture_closed_delivery_pending' if architecture_closed else 'architecture_not_closed')
blocker=None if architecture_closed else {'code':'ARCHITECTURE_NOT_CLOSED','lint_ok':lint_ok,'provider_status':provider_status}
operational_watch=None if operational_delivery_closed else {'code':'TELEGRAM_DELIVERY_WATCH','message':'Hourly report delivery proof is not confirmed yet; architecture is closed through valid provider fallback, delivery remains monitored.'}

canon=protocols/'PROVIDER_ROUTE_CLOSURE_POLICY.md'
canon.write_text('# BEM-632 | Provider Route Closure Policy'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:32 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Provider route is considered closed when either:'+sep+'1. Primary provider has runtime proof, or'+sep+'2. Primary is not proven/unavailable and reserve route is explicitly selected with reason and proof file.'+sep+sep+'A missing primary proof is not a blocker if reserve route is valid and reported honestly.'+sep)

result={'schema_version':'provider_route_and_delivery_closure.v1','bem':'BEM-632','status':status,'architecture_closed':architecture_closed,'operational_delivery_closed':operational_delivery_closed,'provider_status':provider_status,'delivery_status':delivery_status,'lint_ok':lint_ok,'claude_runtime_proven':claude_proven,'reserve_valid':reserve_valid,'delivery_confirmed':delivery_confirmed,'blocker':blocker,'operational_watch':operational_watch,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:32 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem632_close_provider_route_and_delivery_status.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(result,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem632_close_provider_route_and_delivery_status.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-632 | Close Provider Route And Delivery Status | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:32 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Architecture closed'+sep+str(architecture_closed)+sep+sep+'## Provider status'+sep+provider_status+sep+sep+'## Delivery status'+sep+delivery_status+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep+sep+'## Operational watch'+sep+('null' if operational_watch is None else json.dumps(operational_watch,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem632_close_provider_route_and_delivery_status','cycle_id':'bem632-close-provider-route-and-delivery-status','source':'gpt_auditor','status':status,'architecture_closed':architecture_closed,'provider_status':provider_status,'delivery_status':delivery_status,'blocker':blocker,'operational_watch':operational_watch,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:32 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem632_close_provider_route_and_delivery_status']={'status':status,'architecture_closed':architecture_closed,'operational_delivery_closed':operational_delivery_closed,'provider_status':provider_status,'delivery_status':delivery_status,'blocker':blocker,'operational_watch':operational_watch}
contour_state['internal_contour_architecture_status']='closed' if architecture_closed else 'not_closed'
contour_state['hourly_delivery_operational_status']=delivery_status
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 07:32 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem632_close_provider_route_and_delivery_status.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-632: architecture_closed='+str(architecture_closed)+' provider_status='+provider_status+' delivery_status='+delivery_status+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(canon),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Closed provider route as valid reserve fallback when primary runtime proof absent, and separated Telegram delivery as operational watch')
"""
No issue comments.
